name: Bottled Catharsis (Moderate)
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

This drink unlocks a flood of emotions that helps reset your mental state. When you drink this elixir, the elixir attempts to counteract at 4th-rank and has a [[/r 1d20+14 #Counteract]]{+14} counteract modifier each effect on you that has the emotion trait or is inflicting the condition on you, using the listed counteract rank and modifier.
